mute.success.title: $check Muted `{{username}}`
mute.success.description: The user will not be able to send chats
unlock.success.title: $check Unlocked <#{{id}}>
unlock.success.description: Users will be able to send chats in this channel
lock.success.title: $check Locked <#{{id}}>
lock.success.description: Users without permission cannot send chats in this channel
lock_duration.success.description: Users without permission cannot send chats in this channel for {{duration}}
unmute.success.title: $check Unmuted `{{username}}`
unmute.success.description: The user will be able to send chats
kick.success.title: $check Kicked `{{username}}`
kick.success.description: The user will be able to rejoin the server at any time
unban.success.title: $check Unbanned `{{username}}`
unban.success.description: The user will be able to join the server at any time
ban.success.title: $check Banned `{{username}}`
ban.success.timed.description: The user will not be able to join the server for `{{duration}}`
ban.success.untimed.description: The user will not be able to join the server until unbanned
timeout.success.title: $check Set timeout for `{{username}}`
untimeout.success.title: $check Removed timeout for `{{username}}`
slowmode.success.title: $check Set slowmmode for <#{{id}}> to `{{delay}}s`
slowmode.success.description: Users without special permission will have to wait {{delay}}s between each chat they send
kick.not_allowed.title: $cross This member may not be kicked
kick.not_allowed.description: This member has a higher role or they aren't in this server
timeout.not_allowed.title: $cross This member may not have timeout set
timeout.invalid_duration.title: $cross Duration must not be longer then 28 days
ban.not_allowed.title: $cross This member may not be banned
ban.not_allowed.description: This member has a higher role
unban.not_allowed.title: $cross This member is not banned
untimeout.not_allowed.title: $cross This member has no timeout
mute.role_invalid.title: $cross Invalid Mute Role
mute.role_invalid.description:
Your mute role is either:

1. Not been set yet
2. Is not an actual role

To set a mute role use `/config set guild.mute.role <mute role id>`
error.invalid_duration.title: $cross Invalid Duration
error.invalid_duration.description: That is not a valid duration
error.bot_missing_permission.title: $cross I don't have permission!
error.bot_missing_permission.description: I need the {{permission}} permission to complete this action
error.user_missing_permission.title: $cross You don't have permission!
error.user_missing_permission.descriptio: You need the {{permission}} permission to complete this action
error.invalid_delay.title: $cross Invalid Delay
error.invalid_delay.description: That is not a valid delay
error.invalid_channel.title: $cross Invalid Channel
error.invalid_channel.description: That is not a valid channel
muterole.refresh.results.title: Mute Role Refresh Results

generic.success.description: An unknown action you commited to was successful
